posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Mark here, Founder and Lead Llama at Green Llamas, a Silver monday.com Channel Partner.

We’re expanding and actively seeking talented monday.com freelance experts to support our growing client base. We’re looking for strong, capable, and confident individuals to join our team who can handle all aspects of monday.com, including Process Analysis, System Design & Development, Training, Documentation, and Support. Skills in integration tools like make.com or Zapier and/or direct development knowledge with monday.com are a definite plus.

We offer scalable hours, training and certification paths, competitive rates, remote working, and flexible work schedules. You can enjoy working with what you love (monday.com, of course ) on your own terms.

If you’re interested in learning more, please fill out this form and we’ll get back to you with next steps.

Feel free to visit our website to learn more about what we do!

Green Llamas

Join the Herd | Green Llamas

Check out the current job openings at Green Llamas and come join our herd!

Best regards,

Mark
Green Llamas Consulting

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml: Ahhh only in the US?
